UzbekistanTenders Features

Fresh and verified Tenders from Uzbekistan. Find, search and filter Tenders/Call for bids/RFIs/RFPs/RFQs/Auctions published by the government, public sector undertakings (PSUs) and private entities.

  • 1,000+ Tenders
  • Verified Tenders Only
  • New Tenders Every Day
  • Tenders Result Data
  • Archive & Historical Tenders Access
  • Consultants for RFI/RFP/RFQ
  • Tender Notifications & Alerts
  • Search, Sort, and Filter Tenders
  • Bidding Assistance & Consulting
  • Customer Support
  • Publish your Tenders
  • Export data to Excel
  • API for Tender Data
  • Tender Documents
Get Daily Tender Alerts

About UzbekistanTenders

UzbekistanTenders is a domain owned and maintained by Global Tenders Services Pvt. Ltd. (GTS). GTS is in the business of wide range of online Business to Business (B2B) information services like Public procurement information, business information services; IT enabled services and bid facilitation and consultancy services.
The company has been promoted by a group of first generation enthusiastic entrepreneurs, having more than 50 years of cumulative business and operations expertise across various verticals.

The UzbekistanTenders features is a searchable database of all tenders and contracts issued by government departments, local authorities and other public entities in Uzbekistan. This is a comprehensive database of all tenders and contracts issued by government departments, local authorities and other public entities in Uzbekistan.
The database is updated on a daily basis to ensure that all information is up-to-date. The UzbekistanTenders features website offers an easy to use interface for searching for specific tender information, as well as providing an RSS feed for those interested in the latest new additions to the database.

Get FREE SAMPLE TENDERS from Uzbekistan in your email inbox.
